metadata.label: gen2/Discord-DBInfra
metadata.title: Software Engineer- Database Infrastructure
metadata.team_direction: Discord is a platform used by over 200 million people for gaming communication and interaction

revision_priority: Add genuine Rust evidence or remove this resume from consideration for this JD because Rust is mandatory.
Rewrite one core experience bullet to show explicit database-infrastructure ownership instead of broad backend/data collaboration.
portfolio_review.main_failure_reason: Add genuine Rust evidence or remove this resume from consideration for this JD because Rust is mandatory.

findings.issue: JD explicitly signals Rust in responsibilities and preferred stack, but the resume never shows Rust in Skills or bullets.
findings.fix: If the candidate actually used Rust, surface it in the most relevant infrastructure bullet (preferably the backend/reliability work) with the exact component and outcome; otherwise Rust remains a real screening gap for this JD.

findings.issue: Database Infrastructure is a specialized substrate role, but the resume only shows adjacent backend/data/platform work and no direct database-infrastructure artifact, such as HA, replication, query-path, storage-path, or production DB ownership.
findings.fix: Add one bullet in the most relevant role that names true database-infrastructure ownership, for example PostgreSQL HA/replication/recovery, query-path debugging, storage or lock/concurrency work, or production DB reliability validation.

revision_priority: [MUST] Add a direct database-infrastructure bullet in the most relevant experience, not just adjacent backend/data work, and name the actual DB responsibility and outcome.
[MUST] Surface Rust only if it was truly used; otherwise this JD remains a language-signal gap.
[SHOULD] Shorten the Skills lines so each category stays under 14 words while keeping the same three categories.
[NICE] Reduce the all-percentage cadence in the newest experience by adding one scope or ownership clause to the strongest bullet.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] 优先在 TikTok 或 DiDi 里补一条真正的 database-infrastructure 证据：PostgreSQL HA/replication/recovery、query-path debugging、storage/lock/concurrency，或生产 DB reliability validation。若确实写过 Rust，把它放进同一条最相关 bullet，不要只放技能表；若没有 Rust 实操，这个 JD 仍然是明显弱匹配。最后把 Skills 三行压缩到每行 14 词以内，保留当前三类不变。
